title: Crispy Episses in Lacquerware Bowl
description: A simple and elegant dish featuring crispy episses in a beautiful lacquerware bowl. Perfect for a festive occasion.
instructions: Rinse the episses and pat dry with paper towels.
Brush the episses with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Place the episses in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, mince the garlic and set aside.
Once the episses are done, remove from the oven and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Serve immediately in the lacquerware bowl.
Garnish with additional episses if desired.
